hard_stops.logic: project must be initialized before any engineering review activities begin
structural engineering review has identified critical findings — cannot proceed without resolution
geotechnical recommendations have not been incorporated into structural design — foundation integrity at risk

soft_flags.logic: special inspections required but not yet scheduled — must be in place before affected work begins
more than 5 MEP clash detections unresolved — coordination meeting recommended
design change cost exceeds tenant's design change threshold — budget review required
